title: boswellia carteri var. undulatocrenata
intro: Boswellia carteri var. undulatocrenata, also known as Indian frankincense, is a plant species belonging to the Burseraceae family, native to Somalia and parts of Ethiopia. The resin extracted from this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The medicinal properties of Boswellia carteri var. undulatocrenata have been found to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Boswellia carteri var. undulatocrenata is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, teas, and essential oils, making it a popular natural remedy among those seeking alternative therapies.
